description: Native American English. Female, early 40s. Studio-clean, professional. Persona: composed researcher. Emotion: measured, precise, quietly wry. Low, even mid-pitched timbre with a faint flat Michigan vowel beneath trained neutrality; controlled, evenly paced delivery that grows quieter and more exact under pressure, never louder.
text: [deliberate] I would rather show you the finding... than tell you what to conclude. Walking away is clean, but it changes nothing. So I stay close, and I stay careful. [serious] I do not assert what I have not verified.
